title.en: The Heart of the Verdant Abyss

description.ko: 유기적인 수중 숲의 생명력을 상징하는 생물 발광 호흡 기관에 대한 거시적 연구입니다.
description.en: A macroscopic study of a bioluminescent respiratory organ that symbolizes the life force of an organic underwater forest.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Heart of the Verdant Abyss.' A central, pulsating respiratory organelle woven from #7FB069 emerald moss filaments and #2D5A3D vascular membranes, suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid void. The entity rhythmically exhales #FFE66D golden bioluminescent sap that flows like liquid silk through the darkness. Macro focus on the semi-permeable membranes, high-speed fluid dynamics, Octane render, 8k, volumetric light shafts, divine natural atmosphere.
